description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a matte black finish and a wooden fore-end and stock. The stock is full-sized, made of polished wood, and extends smoothly into the receiver, which is metallic and slightly reflective. The fore-end, also wooden, is ribbed for grip and sits beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The barrel is single and unvented, with a simple bead sight at the muzzle. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long black barrel, wooden stock, and ribbed wooden fore-end. The design is robust, with a rounded metallic trigger guard and a single barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and single black barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the muzzle of the barrel and the narrow profile of the fore-end and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous wooden stock, metallic receiver, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, unvented, with a bead sight at the muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
